---
subparagraph: yes
execute:
  echo: false
geometry:
  - top=20mm
  - left=20mm
  - right=20mm
  - bottom=20mm
format:
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
        keep-tex: true
        keep-md: true
        pdf-engine: lualatex
author: Frederick J. Boehm
date: last-modified
phone: 715-252-3929
address: "University of Michigan · 419 Waymarket DR · Ann Arbor, Michigan 48103 · USA"
email: frederick.boehm@gmail.com
fontsize: 12pt
github: fboehm # github account
orcid: 0000-0002-1644-5931 # orcid identifier
#osf: ymqui # osf five character id
#twitter: twitter # twitter handle
web: fboehm.us
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
bibliography: 
  peer: parsing-bib-files/boehm-article.bib
  collection: parsing-bib-files/boehm-incollection.bib
  software: parsing-bib-files/boehm-software.bib
  submitted: parsing-bib-files/boehm-unpublished.bib
  book: parsing-bib-files/boehm-book.bib
  misc: parsing-bib-files/boehm-misc.bib
  proceedings: parsing-bib-files/boehm-inproceedings.bib
validate-yaml: false
csl: chicago-fullnote-bibliography-boehm.csl
engine: jupyter
---


```{python}
import citeproc
from citeproc.source.json import CiteProcJSON
from citeproc_styles import get_style_filepath
from yaml import load, Loader

# Load CSL file
with open('csl_files/chicago-author-date-16th-edition.csl', 'r') as csl_file:
    csl = csl_file.read()
from citeproc.source.bibtex import BibTeX
bib_source = BibTeX('boehm-1.bib')
style = citeproc.CitationStylesStyle(get_style_filepath('apa'))

# Create citation processor
citation_style = CitationStylesBibliography(style, CiteProcJSON(CiteProcJSON(csl)))

# Sort references in reverse chronological order
references.sort(key=lambda x: x['issued']['date-parts'][0], reverse=True)

# Add references to the citation processor
for reference in references:
    citation = citeproc.Citation([citeproc.CitationItem(reference['id'])])
    citation_style.register(citation)

# Print the formatted bibliography
bibliography = citation_style.bibliography()
for entry in bibliography:
    print(entry.render(style))


```



```{python}
# Import the citeproc-py classes we'll use below.
from citeproc import CitationStylesStyle, CitationStylesBibliography
from citeproc import Citation, CitationItem
from citeproc import formatter
from citeproc.source.json import CiteProcJSON

bib_source = CiteProcJSON(references)
bib_style = CitationStylesStyle('harvard1', validate=False)
bibliography = CitationStylesBibliography(bib_style, bib_source, formatter.html)
